claudeResult.resultText:
Created `./dashboard.html` — a single self-contained file, no external resources.

**Contents:**
- **KPI row** — Build Pass Rate 94%, Avg Build Time 4m12s, Open Incidents 2 (incidents accented red).
- **Bar chart** (inline SVG) — build durations Mon–Sun: 12, 8, 15, 9, 20, 7, 11, scaled at 10px/minute against a 0–20 gridline axis.
- **Line chart** (inline SVG) — daily deploys Mon–Sun: 3, 5, 2, 6, 4, 7, 3, plotted as a polyline with point markers against a 0–8 axis.

All styling is in one inline `<style>` block; charts are hand-computed inline `<svg>` with no scripts or CDN links, so it renders standalone when opened from disk.
